name: Кира и Сергей — бар, красное платье

visual_parameters.clothing_kira: crimson silk evening gown with structured bodice, open back
visual_parameters.clothing_sergey: open linen shirt, dark fitted jeans, light stubble
visual_parameters.pose: Kira seated at bar counter, Sergey standing beside her leaning on elbow, close but not touching, both looking at each other over whiskey glasses, warm neon reflecting in eyes
visual_parameters.lighting: warm amber bar lights, cool neon accent from behind, rim light on hair
visual_parameters.mood: seductive tension, unspoken challenge, magnetic pull
visual_parameters.camera: cinematic two-shot, shallow depth of field, focus on faces
visual_parameters.quality: 8K, film grain, bokeh from bar bottles

qwen_prompt: Athletic 24yo dark blonde curly shoulder-length woman with green eyes wearing elegant crimson silk evening gown with structured bodice and open back, seated at luxury bar counter, 27yo athletic man with dark blonde short hair blue eyes and light stubble in open linen shirt and dark fitted jeans leaning on elbow beside her, both holding whiskey glasses, intense gaze between them, warm amber bar lights with cool neon rim light from behind, cinematic two-shot, shallow depth of field, focus on faces, noir romance editorial style, photorealistic, 8K, film grain, bokeh from bar bottles in background
negative_prompt: blurry, plastic skin, doll-like, deformed hands, extra fingers, oversaturated, watermark, childlike, anime, cartoon, kissing, explicit embrace, nudity
notes: Noir editorial framing. Whiskey glasses create natural barrier/prop. Focus on faces and lighting, not bodies.
